task_text: t7-multilingual-fixtures — add 5 code-switched multilingual catering inquiry fixtures (Telugu/Hindi/Tamil mixed with English) to tests/fixtures/dispatcher_traffic.jsonl, exercising the existing dispatcher-replay harness for cases I-001/I-002/I-005/I-006 plus a Tamil bonus. Pure data curation, no helper changes, no schema changes. All fixtures contain at least one English catering keyword so the deterministic priority mock continues to pass.
